name: Fudge Exstasies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped Nuts (I use Black Walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy medium saucepan, heat half of the chocolate chips, unsweetened chocolate, and butter until melted, stirring occasionally.
2. Add eggs, sugar, flour, vanilla, and baking powder to the saucepan. Beat until thoroughly combined.
3. Stir in the remaining chocolate chips and nuts.
4. Drop the mixture by rounded teaspoons, 2 inches apart, onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 8-10 minutes, or until the edges are firm and the surfaces are dull and cracked.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
